title: DesignDocEnrichOutput
description: Output of the design_doc_enricher agent. Provides module_role (one entry per unique module_tag) only. evidence_type and acceptance_criteria are handled by the spec_testability_enricher agent in the refine stage.

modules.description: One entry per unique module_tag. Defines the responsibility of the module.

module_tag.description: Unique module tag (matches module_tag column values in the design spec).

module_role.description: Single allowed implement module_role token (e.g. api, domain, frontend) matching commands.implement.allowed_module_roles. Not a prose sentence. Shared by all specs with the same module_tag.
